title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: rh-podman-desktop bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for rh-podman-desktop is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: Red Hat build of Podman Desktop is a graphical tool for managing containers using Podman. It allows users to run, manage, and configure containers and container images using a desktop GUI.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Update RH Podman Desktop to 1.0 (JIRA:RHEL-146064)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
full_text:
An update for rh-podman-desktop is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Red Hat build of Podman Desktop is a graphical tool for managing containers using Podman. It allows users to run, manage, and configure containers and container images using a desktop GUI.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Update RH Podman Desktop to 1.0 (JIRA:RHEL-146064)
